title: 中考六选五 7: Learning from Different Opinions
passage:
People do not always agree with each other. In class discussions, online comments or family conversations, different opinions appear all the time. 1. ______ If we handle them well, they can help us think more clearly.

The first step is to listen carefully. Many people listen only to prepare their own reply. 2. ______ They may miss the real reason behind the other person’s idea.

A different opinion does not always mean the other person is wrong. Sometimes people focus on different facts or have different experiences. 3. ______ Understanding this can make a discussion less emotional and more useful.

Of course, listening does not mean agreeing with everything. We still need to judge whether an opinion is based on facts and logic. 4. ______ A calm mind is better than a loud voice when we try to find the truth.

When students learn to discuss properly, they become better thinkers. They can explain their own ideas and improve them at the same time. 5. ______ In this way, disagreement becomes a chance to learn rather than a reason to fight.

questions.label: Questions 1-5 - Sentence Insertion
questions.instruction: Choose the best sentence from A-F for each blank in the passage. There is one extra sentence you do not need.

choices.text: But disagreement is not always a problem.
This makes it hard for them to truly understand others.
The same situation may look different from another person’s side.
We should ask for reasons instead of accepting or rejecting too quickly.
They may even discover weaknesses in their own thinking.
Students should avoid people who disagree with them.
